# Supervisor Migration Scope

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/providerintegrationgatedocs -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

[Back to integration gates](../integration-gates.md)

The supervisor is the daemon-tier control loop that connects runtime actors, task claims, preparation, reporting, and shutdown cancellation.

- It owns public daemon runtime orchestration under `internal/agentbridge/supervisor`.
- It delegates canonical persistence through control-plane ports instead of owning server HTTP transport or infra state.
- It remains separate from local API, project/MWSD sync, SaaS adapter, and task DB implementation slices.
